# Test Fixtures

This directory contains test files and sample data used by the test suites.

## Files

- `sample-document.pdf` - Standard test PDF document
- `sample-document-1.pdf` through `sample-document-5.pdf` - Multiple test documents for batch processing tests
- `large-document.pdf` - Large test document for performance testing
- `invalid-file.txt` - Invalid file type for error testing

## Note

These are mock test files for the testing framework. In a real test environment, you would place actual sample PDF files here for comprehensive testing.

For unit and integration tests, the actual file content is mocked through the test setup files.
